description: Sets CSS 3D rotation and perspective on a g3d graph. Data expression consumed by g3d.
utility: Control 3D view rotation and perspective for g3d

arguments.name: rotateX
arguments.description: Rotation around the X axis in degrees

arguments.name: rotateY
arguments.description: Rotation around the Y axis in degrees

arguments.name: rotateZ
arguments.description: Rotation around the Z axis in degrees

alternates.description: Set 3D rotation with custom perspective distance
